brand_identity.name: Nomed
brand_identity.description: Enterprise AI technology consulting and custom software development, with a distinct EdTech division (Estudiantes Digitales).

headings.description: Modern, geometric sans-serif that balances corporate authority with tech innovation.

body.description: Highly readable, technical but humanistic sans-serif for dense data and interface text.

mono.description: Used for tech labels, overlines, and step indicators.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-[4.5rem] leading-[1.05] tracking-tight font-semibold
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl leading-tight tracking-tight font-semibold
hierarchy.overline: text-xs md:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-medium font-mono

bento_grid.marketing: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 md:gap-8

surface_strategies.glassmorphism: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl backdrop-saturate-150 border border-white/40 shadow-sm
surface_strategies.bento_card: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300
surface_strategies.tech_card: bg-[#002a52] border border-[#009ee7]/30 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:border-[#009ee7] transition-colors duration-300

header.layout: Flex container with Logo on left, Desktop Nav centered, CTA on right. Hamburger menu for mobile.
header.logo: Nomed logo with multicolor N and dark blue text.

hero.layout: Split layout or centered text-heavy approach. Generous padding (pt-32 pb-24).
hero.content: H1: 'Construimos tecnología con inteligencia artificial para empresas y educación'.

ctas.style: bg-[#fc5e5f] text-white hover:bg-[#e04e4f] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-transform hover:-translate-y-0.5
bg-[#009ee7] text-white hover:bg-[#008ad1] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-transform hover:-translate-y-0.5
bg-transparent border-2 border-[#003b72] text-[#003b72] hover:bg-[#003b72] hover:text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-all

partners_marquee.items: Text only. 'Microsoft', 'AWS', 'Google Cloud', 'OpenAI', 'Estudiantes Digitales'. IBM Plex Mono, text-slate-400, uppercase, tracking-widest, text-xl mx-12.

value_props.style: Cards with pure white background, subtle border, large Phosphor/Lucide icons in Coral (#fc5e5f).

nosotros.team: Grid of team members using diverse images.

process.visual: Vertical timeline with connecting line. Step numbers in IBM Plex Mono. High contrast layout.

tecnologia.layout: Grid of tech capabilities. Use the 'Tracing Beam' surface strategy for hover effects on cards. Glowing accents in Light Blue (#009ee7).

estudiantes_digitales.style: Distinct visual identity. Background #fffbf7. Text #003b72. Primary interactive color #e8902f (Orange).
estudiantes_digitales.layout: 3 distinct feature cards for ED Master, ED Teach, ED Math.
estudiantes_digitales.visuals: Softer, more approachable borders. Playful but structured.

cuestionario_interactivo.style: Floating glassmorphism card over a subtle patterned background.
cuestionario_interactivo.ux: Progress bar at top. Large selectable buttons for answers.

demo_booking_modal.step_2: Time Selection (Grid of available hour slots).
demo_booking_modal.step_3: User Details Form (Shadcn Form, inputs: Name, Email, Company, Needs).

footer.layout: 4 columns. Massive 'Nomed' text watermark at the bottom.

team_office.description: Diverse team collaborating, use for 'Nosotros/Equipo' section.

team_collaboration.description: Team meeting around laptops, use for 'Nosotros' 4-step process.

edtech_students.description: Diverse students collaborating, use for 'Estudiantes Digitales' section.

tech_abstract_1.description: Glowing data lines abstract, use for 'Tecnologia' dark mode background.

hero_abstract.description: 3D metallic abstract shapes, use for 'Inicio' Hero section background or overlay.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the provided color hex codes. Do not use generic Tailwind colors like 'red-500' when brand colors are specified.
Ensure the Demo Booking modal perfectly replicates a 3-step Calendly flow: Calendar -> Slots -> Form.
Use standard pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layout grids (bento grids). Do not over-rely on Shadcn Card components for macro layout.
Apply Framer Motion for scroll reveals and step transitions in the Quiz and Demo modal.
Implement the Estudiantes Digitales section with its dedicated visual identity (warm background, orange primary).
All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute.
The project uses JavaScript (.js/.jsx), NOT TypeScript. Do not generate .tsx files.
